name: Apricot Baked Ham
recipeIngredient: 1/2 each Fully cooked ham with bone
recipeInstructions:
1. Score the surface of the ham with shallow diamond-shaped cuts.
2. Insert cloves into the cuts.
3. Combine apricot preserves and dry mustard in a bowl.
4. Spread the mixture evenly over the ham.
5. Sprinkle packed light brown sugar over the apricot mixture.
6. Place the ham on a rack in a roasting pan.
7. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 20 minutes per pound, or until the internal temperature of the ham reaches 140 degrees Fahrenheit.
